game_info.title: BLUE REVOLVER: SYSTEM_BREACH
game_info.concept:
Fight, fly, flourish! BLUE REVOLVER is a manic arcade-style shoot-em-up built for newcomers and psychos alike. Powerful special weapons cut through tough areas, while an adaptive difficulty system tailors the game to your skill level as you evade and counter a maniac environmental force! Steam URL: https://store.steampowered.com/app/439490/BLUE_REVOLVER/ ================================================================================ Full Description: ================================================================================ Fight, fly, flourish! BLUE REVOLVER is a manic arcade-style shoot-em-up built for newcomers and psychos alike. Powerful special weapons cut through tough areas, while an adaptive difficulty system tailors the game to your skill level as you evade and counter a maniac environmental force!

Ever feel like the world doesn't understand your talents? Mae is a rabbit-eared genius programmer, able to manipulate reality with a few keystrokes or - the more fun option - blow up large swathes of reality in one of her custom-built Devices. However, genius is never understood in its own time, and she's provoked a severe response from the environmental group "Blue Revolver". Command her defiant counter-attack over 5 stages of manic struggle, blast through hordes of enemies and go face-to-face with fearsome bosses.

DOUBLE ACTION OK! - After a long time in development, our much-awaited DOUBLE ACTION update has been released and is available to all players!

Features:

  • 5 stages of heart-pounding struggle. Snowy mountains, hectic dockyards, nightmare bases and more...

  • Three playable characters, and 12 special weapons to choose from! Blocking bullets, clearing crowds, carving up bosses or milking points - the choice is yours.

  • Adaptive difficulty system - the game tailors its difficulty on the fly to your skill level. Or if you're weird, pick Parallel mode for a glimpse of the most the game can throw at you, including a "nice" surprise at the end.

  • Missions mode - 25 single-stage challenges allow you to build up your skills before going for the full clear! Take on strict survival and scoring challenges, or deal with slightly stranger things - experimental weapons, annoying giant bullets, remixed bosses and more.

  • XP-Mode - Score to level up! Unlock and master a set of oddball superweapons!

  • Flourish for high scores! Build up short chains and finish them off with the special weapon for big points. Score BREAK bonuses by picking apart bosses and big enemies in difficult ways.

  • Full original soundtrack by Qygen and Novaturtle - and tons of usable remix tracks by Exemia, Hyphen, MadDrift, Terranaut, Mitomoro, Blue Phoenix, ikaruga_nex and Aghast.

  • Full new DOUBLE ACTION soundtrack by Exemia and Hagane.

  • Online leaderboards and replays! Aim for heaven!

  • Unlock gallery art, remix tracks and other goodies as you play.

  • Screen scaling options (including portrait mode), rebindable controls, "kiosk mode" for parties or events.

  • All-new legibility options! Customize bullet colours, item transparency, background brightness/saturation to exactly your liking.

  • Play in super-smooth 120Hz mode!
game_info.description:
BLUE REVOLVER: SYSTEM_BREACH is a manic, high-speed vertical shoot-em-up. You play as Mae, a rogue programmer piloting a digital avatar to breach the security systems of the Blue Revolver mainframe. 

Your objective is to survive the relentless barrage of security drones and firewalls while dealing massive damage to the core systems.

Key Mechanics:
- **Chain System**: Destroying enemies rapidly builds your Chain Gauge. Higher chain means higher scores.
- **Break Bonus**: Destroying enemies while at close range yields bonus "Break" points.
- **Special Weapon**: You have a limited-use "Discharge" weapon that clears enemy bullets and deals heavy damage. Use it wisely to escape tight spots or crush tough enemies.
- **Focus Mode**: Hold Shift to slow down your movement for precision dodging. This also reveals your avatar's hitbox.
game_info.controls:
- Arrow Keys: Move your avatar.
- Space: Fire main weapon (hold for rapid fire).
- Shift: Focus Mode (slow movement + show hitbox).
- Z: Discharge (Special Weapon - consumes Energy).
- ENTER: Start Game.
- ESC: Pause / Resume.
- R: Restart Game (from Game Over).

TEST_1.test_description: Survival Test. The automated controller attempts to survive as long as possible by prioritizing dodging over attacking.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The controller scans for the nearest bullet. If a bullet is within a critical radius, it moves in the opposite direction. It fires occasionally but prioritizes evasion.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The player should survive for at least 30 seconds against the initial waves of enemies. The test is successful if the health remains above 0 for the duration.

TEST_2.test_description: Aggressive Score Attack. The controller prioritizes destroying enemies to build the Chain Gauge.
TEST_2.strategy_description: The controller tracks the nearest enemy and aligns the player's X-axis with it to land shots. It uses the Special Weapon (Z) when the screen density of bullets is high.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The player should achieve a score of at least 5000 points before dying. The test is successful if the score threshold is met.

TEST_3.test_description: Focus Mode Mechanics. Tests the slowing effect and hitbox precision of the Focus mechanic.
TEST_3.strategy_description: The controller holds the Shift key permanently while navigating through bullet patterns. It moves towards gaps in bullet clouds.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: The player velocity should consistently match the focus speed. The player should be able to navigate tighter gaps than in normal mode.
